name: Jingle Bell Chompy Mage
description: Jingle Bell Chompy Mage is the Christmas counterpart of Chompy Mage, with an outfit resembling Santa Claus, in Skylanders: Imaginators.
biography: Jingle Bell Chompy Mage is a specially designed toy that appears in the game outfitted in a holiday-inspired wardrobe. He joins the lineup of Sensei Skylanders new to Skylanders Imaginators and is ready to teach the Skylanders some new fighting techniques and a classic Chompy holiday tradition — the White Chompy gift exchange! After all, 'tis the season to be Chompy![1]

story.content: Jingle Bell Chompy Mage is the Christmas counterpart of Chompy Mage, with an outfit resembling Santa Claus, in Skylanders: Imaginators. Jingle Bell Chompy Mage is a specially designed toy that appears in the game outfitted in a holiday-inspired wardrobe. He joins the lineup of Sensei Skylanders new to Skylanders Imaginators and is ready to teach the Skylanders some new fighting techniques and a classic Chompy holiday tradition — the White Chompy gift exchange! After all, 'tis the season to be Chompy![1]

trivia: Jingle Bell Chompy Mage is the second Christmas counterpart of the Life element (the first being Jolly Bumble Blast).
Due to regular Chompy Mage having only been sold in an Amazon-exclusive bundle with other villain Senseis, Jingle Bell Chompy Mage is significantly less valuable on resale than his base counterpart

trailers.name: Meet Chompy Mage l Skylanders Imaginators l Skylanders
